matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
seeded_markers: MET exon 14 skipping model (MET juxtamembrane regulation-loss model)
MET amplification/activation model (MET receptor activation model)
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a MET MET receptor signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to HGF-MET receptor signaling, motility, invasion, epithelial repair, PI3K/MAPK activation, and exon-14 skipping oncology and MET exon 14 skipping and oncology context, HGF-driven motility and invasion biology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the HGF-MET receptor signaling, motility, invasion, epithelial repair, PI3K/MAPK activation, and exon-14 skipping oncology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched MET exon 14 skipping model at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the MET prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.

methylation_sources.label: Whitelist mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses the curated whitelist probes stored in the interpretation database for the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: Gene-name-related mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses rows whose gene annotation explicitly names the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: All numeric-row mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses every numeric beta value that survived preprocessing for the current sample.

cases.label: Gene variant found
cases.prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a MET MET receptor signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to HGF-MET receptor signaling, motility, invasion, epithelial repair, PI3K/MAPK activation, and exon-14 skipping oncology and MET exon 14 skipping and oncology context, HGF-driven motility and invasion biology.
